CVE-2021-44228.requirement_title: All system components protected from known vulnerabilities
CVE-2021-44228.risk: Remote code execution via Log4j in payment processing services
CVE-2021-44228.remediation: Upgrade Log4j to 2.17.1+. Audit all Java-based payment services.

CVE-2021-45046.requirement_title: All system components protected from known vulnerabilities
CVE-2021-45046.risk: Log4j bypass allowing RCE in fintech API gateways
CVE-2021-45046.remediation: Upgrade Log4j to 2.17.1+. Patch immediately if CVE-2021-44228 fix applied.

CVE-2022-22965.requirement_title: Software engineering practices prevent common vulnerabilities
CVE-2022-22965.risk: Spring4Shell RCE affecting Spring-based payment APIs and banking portals

CVE-2023-44487.requirement_title: External and internal penetration testing performed regularly
CVE-2023-44487.risk: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset DDoS attack disrupting payment gateway availability
CVE-2023-44487.remediation: Patch web servers (nginx, Apache). Enable rate limiting on payment endpoints.

CVE-2024-21626.risk: Container escape in runc allowing access to cardholder data environment
CVE-2024-21626.remediation: Upgrade runc to 1.1.12+. Audit all containerized payment services.

CVE-2023-38545.requirement_title: All system components protected from known vulnerabilities
CVE-2023-38545.risk: Heap overflow in curl/libcurl affecting fintech data transfer services
CVE-2023-38545.remediation: Upgrade curl to 8.4.0+. Audit all services using libcurl for API calls.

CVE-2023-46604.requirement_title: Restrict inbound and outbound traffic to that necessary
CVE-2023-46604.risk: Apache ActiveMQ RCE exposing message queues in payment processing pipelines

CVE-2022-3786.requirement_title: All system components protected from known vulnerabilities
CVE-2022-3786.risk: OpenSSL buffer overflow affecting TLS in payment API communications
CVE-2022-3786.remediation: Upgrade OpenSSL to 3.0.7+. Audit all TLS endpoints handling card data.

CVE-2023-29017.requirement_title: Software engineering practices prevent common vulnerabilities
CVE-2023-29017.risk: vm2 sandbox escape in Node.js payment processing scripts
CVE-2023-29017.remediation: Upgrade vm2 to 3.9.15+ or migrate to isolated-vm.

CVE-2022-32212.requirement_title: All system components protected from known vulnerabilities
CVE-2022-32212.risk: Node.js DNS rebinding attack enabling SSRF against internal payment services

CVE-2023-32731.requirement_title: Strong cryptography used to safeguard PAN during transmission
CVE-2023-32731.risk: gRPC TLS certificate verification bypass exposing payment API traffic

CVE-2022-24785.requirement_title: All system components protected from known vulnerabilities
CVE-2022-24785.risk: Moment.js path traversal in fintech dashboards using date formatting
CVE-2022-24785.remediation: Upgrade moment to 2.29.2+. Consider migrating to date-fns or Luxon.

CVE-2023-45133.requirement_title: Software engineering practices prevent common vulnerabilities
CVE-2023-45133.risk: Babel code injection in Node.js fintech build pipelines

CVE-2023-26136.requirement_title: All system components protected from known vulnerabilities
CVE-2023-26136.risk: tough-cookie prototype pollution in Node.js payment session management

CVE-2024-29415.requirement_title: Software engineering practices prevent common vulnerabilities
CVE-2024-29415.risk: ip package SSRF bypass in Node.js fintech microservices
